text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that's a new personal best. If I can keep
this up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue(?)
text_block_list.text: King Halo rises early in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue(?)
text_block_list.text:
She warms up an entire hour before everyone
else. Today, she will embark on a series of
grueling time trials with no breaks in sight—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Um, could you please not narrate my life like
that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nyaha! It's not often you run on the dirt, King. I
thought you hated it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You said it always pelts you in the face.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why I run in the mornings.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It dawned on me when I was practicing around
this time with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
An empty track is the best. You don't get covered
in sand, and there's no one to crowd you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh, that's pretty smart. I never thought about it
like that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I also learned that innumerable training
methods can be used on just one track!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I'm someone who certainly puts what I
learn to good use!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm, you're a good girl who's taking what
your trainer says to heart!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Why did you phrase it like that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that King Halo has been learning a lot
from training!
